Off Calendar Jan-28-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: Intervenors Massachusetts Bay Insurance Company, Maryland Casualty Company, and Fireman's Fund Insurance Company's Motion for Summary Judgment is off calendar per the request of the moving party. Notice of Taking Intervenors' Motion for Summary Judgment Off Calendar filed on January 11, 2021. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)

APPEARANCES:
Emily M. Cunningham of HAWKINS PARNELL & YOUNG (415-766-3200) appearing through CourtCall for Intervenors Massachusetts Bay Insurance Company, Maryland Casualty Company, and Fireman's Fund Insurance Company.

RULING:
